paper_title: Material and methods of Metriocnemus volitans and Gymnometriocnemus species

methods.description: Process for collecting and examining specimens of Metriocnemus volitans and Gymnometriocnemus species for morphological and genetic analysis.

steps.description: We examined eight syntypes of Metriocnemus volitans Goetghebuer from the Royal Belgian Institute of Natural Sciences (RBINS), five male and three female adults mounted between cellophane strips on two separate pins.
steps.searchable_summary: examine syntypes of Metriocnemus volitans from RBINS

steps.description: We also examined the male holotype and a male paratype of Gymnometriocnemus (Raphidocladius) acigus Saether, 1983 (University Museum of Bergen, Norway (ZMBN)) and two male syntypes and a female syntype of Gymnometriocnemus (Gymnometriocnemus) terrestris (RBINS).
steps.searchable_summary: examine holotype and paratype of Gymnometriocnemus acigus and terrestris

steps.description: Additional material of Gymnometriocnemus was collected using a variety of methods in different biosurveillance projects: Malaise traps, sweep netting and fogging of oak canopies.
steps.searchable_summary: collect Gymnometriocnemus using Malaise traps, sweep netting, and fogging

methods.description: Process for DNA extraction, sequencing, and analysis of Gymnometriocnemus specimens to generate COI gene sequences and construct a taxon ID-tree.

steps.description: One to three legs were dissected off the specimens and submitted to the Canadian Centre for DNA Barcoding.
steps.searchable_summary: dissect legs and submit for DNA barcoding

steps.description: DNA extracts and partial COI gene sequences were generated using standard primers and bi-directional Sanger sequencing with BigDye 3.1 termination.
steps.searchable_summary: generate COI gene sequences using Sanger sequencing

steps.description: Alignments were done on amino acid sequences and was trivial as indels were absent; only sequences > 300bp were used in the final alignment.
steps.searchable_summary: perform sequence alignment on amino acid sequences

steps.description: The taxon ID-tree was generated using neighbour joining analysis and 1000 bootstrap replicates on Kimura 2-parameter (K2P) genetic distances in MEGA 6.
steps.searchable_summary: generate taxon ID-tree using neighbour joining analysis
